cases.input_requirement: Design a south-facing 80 sqm house with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom; make the first two spaces adjacent.
设计一套朝北的 72 平方米住宅，包含客厅、厨房和一间卧室；前两个空间必须相邻。
Plan a 72 sqm home with a living room, bedroom, and bathroom; keep the second space separated from the first.
Create an east-facing 88 sqm house with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom; place the second space east of the first.
设计一套朝西的 92 平方米住宅，包含客厅、厨房、卧室和卫生间；第三个空间应位于第一个空间北侧。
规划一套朝南的 66 平方米住宅，包含客厅、卫生间和书房；第三个空间需与第一个空间分隔。
Plan a 72 sqm home with a dining room, kitchen, and bedroom; keep the first space near the second.
创建一套朝南的 75 平方米住宅，包含客厅、厨房和卧室；让第二个空间与第一个相邻，并使第三个空间位于第一个西侧。
